parks.name: Michael Vega Park
parks.description: Community hub with sports fields, playgrounds, and picnic areas along the San Joaquin River.
parks.highlights: Shaded areas available near the river trail

parks.name: Island Grove Park
parks.description: Scenic park with walking paths, native landscaping, and open green spaces for recreation.
parks.highlights: Best sunrise views in River Islands

parks.name: River Islands Boathouse
parks.description: Waterfront recreation center with kayak rentals, fishing access, and marina views.
parks.highlights: Calm morning waters ideal for paddling

parks.name: Nearby Lake Areas
parks.description: Scattered lakefront zones offering fishing spots, bird watching, and peaceful shoreline walks.
